hooks.command: for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then if echo "$file" | grep -q '/cli/'; then uv run --package apollos-cli ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null && uv run --package apollos-cli ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null; elif echo "$file" | grep -q '/backend/'; then uv run --package apollos-portal-backend ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null && uv run --package apollos-portal-backend ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mdx)$'; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && npx @biomejs/biome check --write --files-ignore-unknown=true "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; done

for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?)$' && ! echo "$file" | grep -q '\.test\.'; then base="${file%.tsx}"; [ "$base" = "$file" ] && base="${file%.ts}"; for ext in test.tsx test.ts; do tf="${base}.${ext}"; if [ -f "$tf" ]; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/frontend" && npx vitest run "$tf" --reporter=dot 2>&1 | tail -3; break; fi; done; fi; done

for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if echo "$file" | grep -qE '(\.env|\.env\..+|teams\.yaml)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit secret/config files (.env, teams.yaml)' >&2; exit 1; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE '(^|/)uv\.lock$|(^|/)package-lock\.json$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit lock files (uv.lock, package-lock.json) — use package manager commands instead' >&2; exit 1; fi; done
